title: Clean up nuxt.config.ts image section and verify IPX config
description: Clean up the image section in frontend/nuxt.config.ts: 1) Remove the unnecessary 'providers.backend' custom provider block (it is never used since <NuxtImg> components don't specify provider='backend'). 2) Keep the 'domains' list, the 'alias' (it works correctly when NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE is set at build time), and the nitro.devProxy. 3) Verify that the alias logic is correct: '/media' maps to backend URL. The expected behavior: in Docker build with NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://backend:8000/api/v1, alias becomes 'http://backend:8000/media' so IPX fetches from backend internally. This fixes IPX_FILE_NOT_FOUND for product images with Cyrillic filenames.
acceptance_criteria: nuxt.config.ts image.providers block is removed (not needed)
npm run lint passes in frontend/
